description: Heating, Ventilating, and Air Conditioning checklist

items.check: Space temperature setpoints defined for all zones
Outside air ventilation rates per ASHRAE 62.1
VAV unit capacities match load calculations
Boiler efficiency meets minimum AFUE requirements
Duct insulation R-value meets energy code
DDC controls sequence of operations documented
Economizer controls specified per climate zone
Energy recovery ventilator (ERV) specified where required
Ceiling plenum depth adequate for duct routing
Diffuser locations coordinated with reflected ceiling plan
Thermostat locations coordinated with electrical plan
Fire/smoke dampers at shaft penetrations per IBC
Smoke evacuation system meets IBC requirements
